sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80545" key="pempebo/hos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πεμπεβόηος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n80545.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">made of five ox-hides</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σάμβαλα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sapph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">98</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πενταβόεια</foreign> codd. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
